best_match.name: Buzz Cut
best_match.reason: Emphasizes facial structure and is easy to maintain.

good_options.name: Crew Cut
good_options.reason: Clean and sharp look, great for round faces.

good_options.name: Textured Crop
good_options.reason: Adds texture and dimension, suitable for straight hair.

good_options.name: Ivy League
good_options.reason: Classic and stylish, frames the face well.

not_recommended.name: Mullet
not_recommended.reason: Not suitable for face shape and overall vibe.

not_recommended.name: Mohawk
not_recommended.reason: Too bold, detracts from natural features.

not_recommended.name: Man Bun
not_recommended.reason: Doesn't complement current hair length or density.

analysis.parting_recommendation: No parting for a clean look or slight side part for added style.
analysis.fringe_recommendation: Avoid heavy fringes; a slight fringe can soften the look.

length_options.short_verdict: Highly recommended for ease and style.
length_options.medium_verdict: Can try for more style versatility.
length_options.long_verdict: Not ideal; may overwhelm the face shape.

analysis.summary: A Buzz Cut is the best match for a simple, stylish look that requires low maintenance. This complements the round face and medium forehead. Darker, cool-toned hair colors are recommended to enhance the natural features.
care_tips: Use a gentle shampoo for your hair type.
Maintain regular trims to keep the style sharp.
